seo.title: Tawjeeh AI | Guiding AI Inside the Business
seo.description: Tawjeeh AI helps organizations guide AI inside the business through structured products, practical solutions, focused research, and useful resources.
seo.ogTitle: Tawjeeh AI | Guiding AI Inside the Business
seo.ogDescription: A bilingual landing page for Tawjeeh AI focused on guiding AI inside the business across products, solutions, research, and resources.

hero.title: Make AI work inside the way your business actually operates.
hero.description: Tawjeeh AI helps organizations place AI inside workflows, teams, decisions, and governance with the right operating model, product thinking, and research discipline.
hero.panelTitle: One story for how AI fits inside the organization.
hero.panelDescription: A clearer brand system for companies that need AI to be embedded into how the business moves, not isolated from it.

metrics.label: Core sections
metrics.description: Products, solutions, research, and resources aligned under one focused narrative.

metrics.label: Language ready
metrics.description: Arabic and English each render with their natural direction and typography.

metrics.label: Positioning
metrics.description: Every section now speaks directly to guiding AI inside the business.

panelItems.title: Products
panelItems.description: Reusable offerings that help teams structure, govern, and launch AI inside business functions.

panelItems.title: Solutions
panelItems.description: Practical engagements that align leadership, operations, and delivery around real AI adoption.

panelItems.title: Research
panelItems.description: Signals, pilot learnings, and market intelligence that reduce guesswork before scale.

panelItems.title: Resources
panelItems.description: Playbooks, frameworks, and working material teams can use to move with more confidence.

products.title: Reusable products for putting AI to work inside the business.
products.description: Our product layer helps organizations move beyond vague AI ambition and into systems that can be owned, operated, and improved over time.

items.title: AI Business Map
items.description: A structured way to connect AI opportunities to business functions, owners, priorities, and measurable outcomes.

items.title: AI Workflow Studio
items.description: A guided product surface for embedding AI into the day-to-day work of teams without creating operational chaos.

items.title: Governance Signals
items.description: Review paths, escalation logic, and accountability checkpoints that keep AI reliable inside the business.

solutions.title: Solutions that guide AI from strategy into execution.
solutions.description: We help companies turn AI from an abstract priority into working business infrastructure by aligning decisions, teams, and delivery paths.
solutions.callout: This section is intentionally built around business clarity: each solution shows where AI belongs, who owns it, and how it becomes useful in practice.

items.title: Executive alignment
items.description: Define where AI should create advantage, where it should not, and how leaders make clear investment decisions.

items.title: Workflow integration
items.description: Place AI inside actual operating flows instead of adding disconnected tools that teams struggle to adopt.

items.title: Function-specific rollouts
items.description: Tailor AI adoption to departments such as growth, service, operations, and internal support.

items.title: Cross-team enablement
items.description: Create the shared language, policies, and building blocks that let different teams move with confidence.

research.title: Research that keeps AI decisions grounded before the business scales them.
research.description: Research is where we test assumptions, monitor signals, and turn early findings into stronger business decisions about where AI belongs.
research.featuredTitle: From signal tracking to applied insight
research.featuredPanelTitle: AI adoption patterns inside real organizations
research.featuredPanelDescription: We look at where teams create value, where governance breaks down, and how language, workflow design, and review models influence adoption.

stats.descriptionOne: Adoption signals, operational friction, and governance patterns mapped into practical guidance.

items.title: Market observation
items.description: We study how AI products, vendor patterns, and organizational behaviors shift over time so decisions stay current.

items.title: Applied experiments
items.description: Small research loops let us test where AI can safely deliver impact before it is expanded inside the business.

items.title: Adoption intelligence
items.description: We examine team capability, process maturity, and governance readiness to guide rollout timing and scope.

resources.title: Resources that help teams move from AI interest to informed action.
resources.description: A practical resource layer gives stakeholders a shared way to talk about AI, evaluate opportunities, and keep execution aligned.

items.title: Business AI playbooks
items.description: Structured guides for placing AI into functions, prioritizing use cases, and defining responsible ownership.

items.title: Decision frameworks
items.description: Clear models for evaluating readiness, selecting rollout paths, and deciding when human review is required.

items.title: Team resources
items.description: Working materials that help leaders and delivery teams speak the same language as AI becomes part of the business.

finalCta.title: If your business needs AI to feel operational, trustworthy, and properly guided, this is where the conversation starts.
finalCta.description: Tawjeeh AI is positioned around one idea: guiding AI inside the business with more clarity, better structure, and stronger execution logic.

footer.tagline: Tawjeeh AI designs products, solutions, research, and resources for guiding AI inside the business.
